name: Jean-Marc Chery
background: Jean-Marc Chery is STMicroelectronics’ President and Chief Executive Officer and has held this position since May 31, 2018. He is the Sole Member of the Managing Board and chairs the Company’s Executive Committee. Chery began his career at Matra, the French engineering group. In 1986, he joined Thomson Semiconducteurs, which subsequently became ST. He has held various management positions in product planning and manufacturing, rising to lead ST’s front-end manufacturing operations in Asia Pacific. In 2005, he was appointed Head of 6-inch manufacturing and in 2006, he took charge of all front-end manufacturing. In 2008, he was promoted to Chief Technology Officer. In 2014, he was appointed Chief Operating Officer.

commpanies.name: STMicroelectronics N.V.
commpanies.title_or_role: President and Chief Executive Officer, Sole Member of the Managing Board
